test_description: Validates that EA rejects attempts to open a second position in the same symbol

signals.event_title: Signal 2: BUY EURUSD Again - Should Be Rejected
signals.rationale: Attempt second EURUSD position with different parameters
signals.expected_outcome: REJECTED - Position already open in EURUSD
signals.expected_log_message: SKIP: Position already open in EURUSD

test_procedure: Ensure no EURUSD position is open
Immediately send signal 2 (BUY EURUSD again) - should be rejected
Check EA log for duplicate rejection message
Verify first position is still open (not affected by rejection)
Close the EURUSD position manually to clean up
success_criteria: EA log contains duplicate symbol rejection message
First position remains open and unaffected
No execution error on rejection attempt
edge_cases: Test with same action (BUY + BUY) - both should reject
Test with different action (BUY EURUSD then SELL EURUSD) - should reject as position exists
Test with different volumes and confidence levels
